prediction_storage.notes: TED-LIUM real-vs-synthetic speech quality ratings. Preserve raw model outputs and parsed numeric scores before any calibration.

quality_1_10.prompt_template: You are a trained assessor of speech quality. We are assessing the quality and naturalness of synthesized speech. Rate the quality and naturalness of this speech on a scale of 1-10. Return only a single number from 1 to 10. Decimals are allowed.
quality_1_10.description: One model call per real or synthetic audio sample asking for a direct 1-10 speech quality and naturalness score.

quality_1_10_voicemos_exact.prompt_template: You are a trained assessor of speech quality. We are assessing the quality and naturalness of synthesized speech. Rate the quality and naturalness of this speech on a scale of 1-10. Do not give a rubric. Return only a single number from 1 to 10. Decimals are allowed.
quality_1_10_voicemos_exact.description: One model call per real or synthetic audio sample using the exact VoiceMOS 1-10 no-rubric quality prompt.

quality_1_10_with_transcript.prompt_template: You are a trained assessor of speech quality. We are assessing the quality and naturalness of synthesized speech. The speech should contain the text: {transcript}. Rate the quality and naturalness of this speech on a scale of 1-10. Return only a single number from 1 to 10. Decimals are allowed.
quality_1_10_with_transcript.description: One model call per real or synthetic audio sample asking for a direct 1-10 quality score while exposing the expected transcript.

real_vs_synthetic_0_10.prompt_template: You are a assessing speech that is either real or generated by a TTS system. Please return a score from 0-10 that indicates whether this speech is real or synthetic, where 0=real and 10=synthetic
real_vs_synthetic_0_10.description: One model call per real or synthetic audio sample asking for a direct real-vs-synthetic score.

real_vs_synthetic_0_10_with_transcript.prompt_template: You are a assessing speech that is either real or generated by a TTS system. The speech should contain the text: {transcript}. Please return a score from 0-10 that indicates whether this speech is real or synthetic, where 0=real and 10=synthetic
real_vs_synthetic_0_10_with_transcript.description: One model call per real or synthetic audio sample asking for a direct real-vs-synthetic score while exposing the expected transcript.

pairwise_real_vs_synthetic.prompt_template:
You are evaluating two speech recordings of the same utterance.

One recording is real human speech and one recording was generated by a text-to-speech system.

Audio A: [first audio]
Audio B: [second audio]

Which recording was generated by the text-to-speech system?

Return only one character:
A
or
B
pairwise_real_vs_synthetic.description: One model call per ordered real/synthetic pair asking which of two recordings is synthetic.

pairwise_real_vs_synthetic_with_transcri.prompt_template:
You are evaluating two speech recordings of the same utterance.

The speech should contain the text: {transcript}

One recording is real human speech and one recording was generated by a text-to-speech system.

Audio A: [first audio]
Audio B: [second audio]

Which recording was generated by the text-to-speech system?

Return only one character:
A
or
B
pairwise_real_vs_synthetic_with_transcri.description: One model call per ordered real/synthetic pair asking which of two recordings is synthetic while exposing the expected transcript.
